rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by fixing unresolved references or removing invalid clauses
Preserve type consistency in expressions and helper declarations
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex
Align helper declaration types with expression types
generic_rules: Use only valid AGREE scalar types: int, real, and bool
Ensure comparison expressions are of type bool
Use integer literals and arithmetic for int type expressions
Use real literals and arithmetic for real type expressions
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Do not use undefined helper functions or package-qualified references without proper imports
Do not mix numeric types in expressions without explicit conversion
